decision.value: Persist webhook envelopes in PostgreSQL before Kafka publication
decision.evidence: persist the envelope in PostgreSQL first, then an outbox worker can publish it

tradeoff.value: An extra write is accepted for replayability
tradeoff.evidence: One extra write is worth replayability.

alternative.value: Publish Stripe webhooks straight to Kafka
alternative.evidence: Publishing Stripe webhooks straight to Kafka

architecture_change.evidence: an outbox worker can publish it

open_question.value: Whether offsets are committed only after projections succeed
open_question.evidence: committing consumer offsets only after projections succeed
